name: • | Gojo Vs Sukuna
description: The fight between Satoru Gojo and Ryomen Sukuna takes place in the anime and manga series "Jujutsu Kaisen." The fight between Satoru Gojo and Ryomen Sukuna takes place in the Shinjuku District, With all of the jujutsu world watching off a live stream began by Mei Mei, Yuji Maki Yuta Hakari Kashimo Higurama Yuta and others watch the battle from the sidelines making a plan to defeat sukuna IF Gojo was to fall.
creator: Manipulator
